title: Minecraft Overhauled
description: A collection of mods to enhance the way you play Minecraft.
body:
![Thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4be6d77f4db89ef930db85f4ef0206fba46bd602.png)

# **Welcome to Minecraft Overhauled!**  

Minecraft Overhauled is a carefully curated collection of mods, resource packs, and shaders designed to take your Minecraft experience to the next level. This pack transforms the game with enhanced world generation, countless new structures, and endless opportunities for exploration.  

Perhaps you'll find yourself trading in **ChoiceTheorem’s Overhauled Villages** or venturing deep into one of the many scattered dungeons. Every corner of your world holds something new to discover!  

If you love building, **Chipped** adds an incredible variety of blocks, letting you customize every detail of your world. Want to turn that dream base into a cozy home? **Handcrafted** brings stylish furniture and decorations to make your builds feel truly lived-in. **Supplementaries** expands your building options even further with interactive and functional decorations, making every corner of your world more immersive.  

Exploration has never been more exciting—**Moog’s many structure mods** and **Structory** fill your world with new dungeons, ruins, and settlements, ensuring there's always something fresh to stumble upon. **Regions Unexplored** breathes life into the Overworld with stunning new biomes, from lush forests to treacherous wastelands. And the adventure doesn’t stop there—**BetterNether** turns the Nether into a fiery realm of dense forests and eerie ruins, while **BetterEnd** transforms the End into a mystical dimension with glowing plants, unique biomes, and towering spires.  

To make your travels easier, the **Waystones mod** lets you set up teleportation points, making long journeys a breeze. And as you explore, keep an eye out for **Artifacts**, powerful gear hidden in chests and dungeons that grant unique abilities to aid you on your adventure.  

Of course, visuals and immersion matter just as much. The **Fresh Animations** resource pack brings Minecraft’s mobs to life with fluid, expressive movements. **LambDynamicLights** ensures that torches and lanterns glow dynamically, casting realistic light as you carry them.  

Worried about performance? Don't be! While this pack enhances visuals and gameplay, it also includes optimization mods working behind the scenes to **keep everything running smoothly**. Whether you're exploring breathtaking landscapes or battling through dungeons, you'll get the best performance possible.  

I hope you enjoy this modpack and all the adventures that await!


There might be a trailer video for this soon!

I highley recommend [BlazeandCave's Advancements Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blazeandcaves-advancements-pack) to improve your immersion in the game!
